name: Rastar Group
summary: Rastar Group manufactures and sells licensed model cars in China. It provides RC and die cast cars, ride-on bikes, and baby safety car seats under the RASTAR and Rastar Baby brands. The company exports its products to approximately 47 countries, primarily Europe, Japan, the United States, Australia, Singapore, South Korea, and Hong Kong. Rastar Group was founded in 2000 and is based in Shantou, China.
